title: Blog welcome
author: Andrew E. Lawrence
description: Read about my plans for this blog.

title: Beyond the Frame of Our Lives: All Light, Everywhere, Surveillance, and the Illusion of Objectivity
author: Andrew E. Lawrence
description: This essay explores the work of All Light, Everywhere (2021) to critque the perceived objectivity of surveillance technologies and raise ethical concerns about their societal impact.

title: Morality, Capability, and the Ethics of Decision-Making AI
author: Andrew E. Lawrence
description: This paper addresses the growing concerns about decision-making algorithms, focusing on whether they perpetuate discriminatory practices and exhibit unfair behaviors, and explores the ethical implications of their widespread use in society.

title: Pacing Progress; Mitigating Risks in the Rapid Evolution of AI/ML Systems
author: Andrew E. Lawrence
description: This essay explores the ethical and practical challenges of developing AI systems, ultimately calling for more cautious and transparent development.
